ActorFrame.Condition: IsEventMode() or OnePassed() and not IsFinalStage()

Layer.OnCommand: %function(self) if not OnePassed() then self:sleep(.4); end; self:sleep(.4); self:linear(.2); self:diffusealpha(0); end

%function(self) self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+6); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+105); if not OnePassed() then self:zoom(0); self:sleep(.4); self:zoom(1); end; self:sleep(.4); self:linear(.2); self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+78); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+127); end
%function(self) if not OnePassed() then self:sleep(.4); end; self:sleep(.4); self:sleep(.2); self:linear(.2); self:diffusealpha(0); end
%function(self) if not OnePassed() then self:sleep(.4); end; self:sleep(.4); self:linear(.2); self:diffusealpha(0); end

%function(self) self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+6); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+105); if not OnePassed() then self:zoom(0); self:sleep(.4); self:zoom(1); end; self:sleep(.4); self:linear(.4); self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+148); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+167); end

ActorFrame.Condition: not IsEventMode() and not OnePassed() or IsFinalStage()

Layer.OnCommand: %function(self) self:sleep(.5) self:linear(.5) if not GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) then self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+90); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y-20) end if not GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) then self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X-90); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y-20) end if GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_1) and GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) then self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X); self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y-80) end end
Layer.children: <Layer Condition="OnePassed() and STATSMAN:GetBestGrade() <= GRADE_TIER08" File="@GetClass()" InitCommand="@GetClassInit()" />
